paragraphs: Program adherence assessment

Let's evaluate your adherence to identify focus points where we can improve on your progress and address any problems you’re facing. Note that this is not an exam. It is a moment of objective reflection for your own personal benefit.
Diet
How do you track your macros: do you weigh all your foods or eyeball many things?
How do you log what you eat? Do you use an app?
How many days in the past week did your nutritional intakes meet their recommendations?
Calories:
Protein:
Fat:
Carbohydrate:
Dietary fiber:
Omega-3:
Cholesterol:
What are your main sources of dietary fiber?
What are your main sources of omega-3?
How many social eating events or ‘cheat meals’ did you have last month where you didn’t track your macros?
How many meals within the past week were consumed more than 2 hours away from their regular meal time?
Training
How many planned training sessions did you miss in the last month?
Have you ever watched a video of yourself performing every exercise in your program to assess your technique?
How many training sessions in the last month took place more than 2 hours away from your regular training time?
Lifestyle
How many days in the last week did you sleep soundly for at least 7.5 hours?
How long does it typically take you to fall asleep?
How often do you typically wake up at night to go to the bathroom?
How often do you typically wake up at night for any other reason?
How many days in the last week did you go to bed more than an hour away from your regular bedtime?
How would you describe your stress level?
Would you say your life is hectic?
Do you often think about work during leisure time?
full_text:
Program adherence assessment

Let's evaluate your adherence to identify focus points where we can improve on your progress and address any problems you’re facing. Note that this is not an exam. It is a moment of objective reflection for your own personal benefit.  

Diet

How do you track your macros: do you weigh all your foods or eyeball many things?

How do you log what you eat? Do you use an app? 

How many days in the past week did your nutritional intakes meet their recommendations?

Calories: 

Protein: 

Fat: 

Carbohydrate: 

Dietary fiber: 

Omega-3: 

Cholesterol: 

What are your main sources of dietary fiber?

What are your main sources of omega-3?

How many social eating events or ‘cheat meals’ did you have last month where you didn’t track your macros?

How many meals within the past week were consumed more than 2 hours away from their regular meal time?

Training

How many planned training sessions did you miss in the last month?

Have you ever watched a video of yourself performing every exercise in your program to assess your technique?

How many training sessions in the last month took place more than 2 hours away from your regular training time?

Lifestyle

How many days in the last week did you sleep soundly for at least 7.5 hours?

How long does it typically take you to fall asleep?

How often do you typically wake up at night to go to the bathroom? 

How often do you typically wake up at night for any other reason?

How many days in the last week did you go to bed more than an hour away from your regular bedtime?

How would you describe your stress level?

Would you say your life is hectic? 

Do you often think about work during leisure time?
